entries.title: Schulich Leader Scholarship Recipient
entries.description: Recognized as one of the top 100 STEM students in Canada for leadership, initiative, and building impactful engineering solutions. Awarded $120 000 over 4 years.

entries.title: McEwen Family Entrance Award in Biomedical Engineering
entries.description: Awarded $25 000 entrance scholarship for academic achievement, leadership, and entrepreneurial initiative in biomedical engineering.

entries.title: Ingenious+ Regional Winner — Mind-Controlled Drone
entries.description: Received a $1,000 grant for a mind-controlled drone project exploring brain-computer interfaces and assistive technology.

entries.title: WISE UCalgary Research Award
entries.description: One of ten students selected across Calgary — awarded a $1,000 scholarship for summer research on smarter agriculture and IoT crop monitoring.

entries.title: Inventures Canada — Youth in Tech Panel
entries.description: Shared my STEM journey — from self-stabilizing spoons to brain-controlled keyboards — and how industry can support youth builders.

entries.title: Nurture Biotech — From App to Company
entries.description: Grew a Technovation project into Nurture Biotech, supporting mothers with postpartum depression screening while building as co-founder, programmer, and product manager.

entries.title: CTV News — FIRST Robotics Feature
entries.description: Featured for community outreach and STEM education with Sparkans Robotics, representing Calgary at an international competition.

entries.title: 10x Future Founder Award
entries.description: Awarded a $1,000 scholarship recognizing passion for tech, innovation, and entrepreneurship within the Calgary tech community.
